description: Capture the attention of your online fashion shoppers with an appealing email template designed for e-commerce. This template is perfect to re-engage customers who have abandoned their cart, specifically targeting those interested in fashion, particularly t-shirts. The design incorporates a trendy mix of pink and violet, embodying a youthful and energetic vibe that aligns perfectly with a fashion-forward shop or store. With this template, you can effectively remind your customers of their pending purchases and encourage them to complete their transactions. It's an excellent tool for boosting your store's conversion rate while maintaining a stylish and modern aesthetic.
short_description: Boost your e-commerce conversion rates with our stylish email template. Perfect for re-engaging customers who've abandoned their cart in your fashion store. Trendy pink and violet design aligns with fashion-forward t-shirt shops. A modern tool for increasing sales.

designer.description: I spend my days crafting gorgeous graphics. I work mainly with small local businesses. I’ve just spent 2 years living in Sweden. I moved back to Russia in October 2015 and am now settled in Moskow. I’m constantly learning design related topics, currently playing around a lot with flyer design for clubs and pubs.
